## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or API keys are hard-coded or committed
- [ ] `DRY_RUN`, `ALLOW_CODE_EVAL`, and `ALLOW_SELF_MODIFICATION` defaults are **not** weakened
- [ ] New environment variables are documented in `.env.example` and `SECURITY.md` (if security-relevant)
- [ ] Any new API endpoints are protected by `requireAuth` where appropriate
- [ ] No new unvalidated user input reaches the agent instruction queue
